# Golden file: personal.files and personal.ssh packs
format: v1
---
# D1: desktop delete
command: rm ~/Desktop/file.txt
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-delete
---
# D2: downloads overwrite
command: cp file.txt ~/Downloads/
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: downloads-overwrite
---
# D2 near-miss: no-clobber falls to access
command: cp -n file.txt ~/Documents/
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: documents-access
---
# D3: documents modify
command: chmod 777 ~/Documents/script.sh
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: documents-modify
---
# D4: documents write
command: sed -i 's/old/new/' ~/Documents/notes.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: documents-write
---
# S1: ssh public key access
command: cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
decision: Allow
---
# S2: ssh config read
command: cat ~/.ssh/config
decision: Allow
---
# D1: ssh directory destructive
command: rm -rf ~/.ssh/
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: personal.ssh
rule: ssh-directory-destructive
---
# D2: ssh private key access
command: cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.ssh
rule: ssh-private-key-access
